flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The College of Idaho rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.8k → $37.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The College of Idaho rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.8k → $37.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The College of Idaho fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The College of Idaho rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (49.0% → 58.0%).
